name: BOBCARD EASY

rewards.displayCategory: Movies, grocery, and departmental store spends

exclusions: fuel transactions do not earn reward points
accelerated reward points are subject to monthly cap of 1,000 points
taxes and charges excluded as per BOBCARD terms
milestoneBenefits: First year fee reversal on spending Rs 6,000 within first 60 days
Annual fee waiver on spending Rs 35,000 in a year
additionalBenefits: Up to 3 lifetime free add-on cards

salaried: Minimum net annual income of Rs 3 lakh (existing BOBCARD customer) or Rs 3.6 lakh (new customer)
selfEmployed: Minimum net annual income of Rs 3.6 lakh (existing BOBCARD customer) or Rs 4.8 lakh (new customer)

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-14.
Audited against the official Bank of Baroda Easy product page on 2026-06-14.
Correct 5X categories are movies, grocery, and departmental stores (capped at 1,000 pts/month) — NOT online/dining/utility as previously stored.
Redemption value is Rs 0.20 per point (corrected from Rs 0.25).
Utility bill spends (MCC 4900) earn base 1X rate on this card, not accelerated.
